fields.acceptance_criteria: rmcp client performs startup JSON-RPC stdio handshake and registers external tools; tool calls carry per-session routing metadata so parallel sessions route to correct MCP instances; tool-call audit records name/args/exit/artifacts correlated by session+tool-call id.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH4] MCP integration + per-session tool routing envelope
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-core. Primary: cargo test -p agent-core (handshake/registration mock, per-session routing isolation, audit record shape). Manual: none. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
